method: Clean split cloud rebound A3/B3. User rule: below_cloud / thủng mây dưới thì không mua. A3 buys only near lower cloud touch with rebound indicators. B3 buys above_cloud or in_cloud near lower cloud with improving momentum. R/S still only zone/stop-target. Excludes VIC/VHM. Saves full entryIndicators and futurePath.
